caption: A woman with blonde hair tied back, wearing a light gray t-shirt and white pants, walks away from the camera through a doorway into a room. The setting appears to be a classroom or a similar workspace, containing several brown tables and chairs arranged in rows. Large windows in the background allow daylight into the room. As the woman moves forward, her body shifts slightly, and she continues stepping further into the space. The white walls of the room are punctuated by a small light switch and a framed piece of art on the left wall. The sequence captures her progression from the threshold of the doorway toward the center of the room, with the background elements remaining static as she moves further away from the viewer.
